title: Build native_sim MeshCore app-compat test harness
description: Why this exists: MeshCore adapter behavior needs automated proof before hardware/client smoke tests. What needs to be done: create a native_sim or host-side test harness that feeds MeshCore app frames into the adapter and inspects responses plus LICHEN local-interface calls. Cover connect/init, node identity/status/config reads, message ingress, incoming message egress, malformed input, unsupported commands, and queue limits. Acceptance criteria: west build/twister test runs on Linux EC2 Zephyr cache; tests fail if handlers are bypassed or if MeshCore RF is used as the LICHEN RF path; commands and results are recorded in Beads notes.
notes:
Input from project-LICHEN-9c4y.3 codec strategy: native_sim/Twister harness should include a meshcore_codec ztest backed by canonical vectors, covering inner byte frames, BLE raw frames, serial/TCP framing, malformed/truncated/oversized input, unknown commands, and byte-for-byte response encoders.
Implemented no-hardware harness slice: added lichen/tests/meshcore_codec native_sim/qemu ztest with generated fixtures from test/vectors/meshcore_app_compat.json. Coverage includes all 33 canonical MeshCore vectors, direct inner frame decode, command-known boundaries, canonical serial/TCP-style framing bytes, canonical 2-byte error response encoders, OK encoder, malformed/null/zero/oversized decode rejection, serial encoder null/short/oversized rejection, and response encoder bounds. Extended lichen/tests/meshcore_adapter with concatenated stream-frame dispatch coverage for TCP-like multiple frames in one read.

Local checks: python3 lichen/tests/meshcore_codec/gen_vectors.py test/vectors/meshcore_app_compat.json /tmp/meshcore_codec_vectors.h PASS (33 source vectors, 33 codec rows, 18 error encoder rows); git diff --check PASS.

EC2 native_sim direct validation on i-05e27e074db786e22 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr, worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-9c4y6: . /mnt/lichen-zephyr/env.sh; west build -p always -b native_sim lichen/tests/meshcore_codec -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-9c4y6/lichen && west build -t run => PASS, meshcore_codec 9/9. west build -p always -b native_sim lichen/tests/meshcore_adapter -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-9c4y6/lichen && west build -t run => PASS, meshcore_adapter 21 pass / 1 expected skip, total 22.

EC2 Twister: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshcore_codec -T lichen/tests/meshcore_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshcore_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/app_interface -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-meshcore-harness --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-9c4y6/lichen => PASS, 5/5 configurations, 77 test cases executed, 3 expected skips, 0 warnings. twister-out-meshcore-harness was not committed.

Code review outcomes after patch: Harvey the 3rd: no P0-P2 findings; generator sanity-run and generated-header C syntax check, no edits. Sagan the 3rd: no P0-P2 findings; qemu_x86 meshcore_codec 9/9 passed; native_sim unavailable locally due macOS. Faraday the 3rd: no P0-P2 findings; qemu_x86 meshcore_codec 9/9 and meshcore_adapter 21 pass / 1 skip; native_sim EC2 meshcore_codec 9/9 and meshcore_adapter 21 pass / 1 skip; no edits.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware native_sim MeshCore app-compat harness. Added canonical-vector-backed meshcore_codec ztest plus adapter concatenated stream coverage; EC2 direct native_sim and Twister passed; three independent reviews found no P0-P2 issues. Evidence is recorded in Bead notes.
